description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual summer attire, featuring a sleeveless tank top and knee-length shorts. The figure has a well-defined, athletic build and stands with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He wears low-top sneakers and has a modern, short hairstyle with the sides trimmed and the top styled upward. The clothing fits loosely, with the tank top slightly wrinkled and the shorts featuring visible pockets and seams. The figure's facial features are stylized but realistic, and the overall appearance suggests a relaxed, urban pedestrian. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult male in a tank top, shorts, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose with a modern short hairstyle. The figure has an athletic build and a relaxed, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top, shorts, sneakers, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank top, shorts, and hairstyle details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and leg, with visible ear and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, styled upward with trimmed sides
